TEST.0.title: Codebusters 2026 Division B Regional Test # 9
TEST.0.customHeader:
Names of participants: (Please print neatly)

 
 
 
School Name:

Check your team:  ◻ Varsity     ◻ JV1     ◻ JV2     ◻ JV3

Warning: Do not open this packet until given permission to do so.

Note: There are useful notes after this page.

CIPHER.490.cipherString: That which comes into understanding is vision and that which comes into experience is knowledge.
CIPHER.490.question: Dada Bhagwan offers us some advice that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.490.author: Dada Bhagwan

CIPHER.472.cipherString: Life is about overcoming obstacles and they are all mental
CIPHER.472.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Baconian version of Shaun S. Lott's famous words. What does it say?
CIPHER.472.author: Shaun S. Lott

CIPHER.466.cipherString: You have become a team. And you're going to be drawing upon each other for the rest of your lives.
CIPHER.466.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Mark Milley encoded with an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.466.author: Mark Milley

CIPHER.481.cipherString: Have an attitude of gratitude. Be thankful for your health now. Don't wait till Thanksgiving.
CIPHER.481.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Joshua Tongol encrypted as a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has WAITTIL somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.481.author: Joshua Tongol

CIPHER.467.cipherString: With my talent, I can make people laugh and give them another attitude about life. What a blessing that is for me.
CIPHER.467.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Doris Roberts encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.467.author: Doris Roberts

CIPHER.484.cipherString: Keep your best wishes, close to your heart and watch what happens
CIPHER.484.question: A mysterious balloon release at the science fair carried this Atbash banner by Tony DeLiso. What does it say?
CIPHER.484.author: Tony DeLiso

CIPHER.471.cipherString: Experiment is an art, and demands an artist.
CIPHER.471.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Aristotle: a Chapter from the History of Science, written in a Baconian Cipher. You are told that the deciphered text starts with a single letter followed by XPER. What does it say?
CIPHER.471.author: Aristotle: a Chapter from the History of Science

CIPHER.482.cipherString: I don't have an attitude; I have a personality you can't handle.
CIPHER.482.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote, encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of MAYOR and polybius key of CAMPSITE. What does it say?
CIPHER.482.author: Unknown

CIPHER.488.cipherString: The best form of government is that which is most likely to prevent the greatest sum of evil.
CIPHER.488.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by James Monroe, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of TRIANGLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.488.author: James Monroe

CIPHER.483.cipherString: Art is the concrete representation of our most subtle feelings.
CIPHER.483.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Nihilist Substitution quote by Agnes Martin with a keyword of TANKER and polybius key of COMPLAINTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.483.author: Agnes Martin

CIPHER.473.cipherString: Do people who bring bikes on the subway realize what bikes do?
CIPHER.473.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.473.author: Unknown

CIPHER.477.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote, written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 3811478 9538602 decode to?

CIPHER.469.cipherString: A scientist said once that if the ocean were as clear as the sky, if we could see everything in it, no one would ever go in the sea.
CIPHER.469.question: Your chemistry lab's fume hood started beeping in Morse… but the real puzzle is this Patristocrat quote by Cassandra Clare using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with ASCI. What does it say?
CIPHER.469.author: Cassandra Clare

CIPHER.478.cipherString: There is always room for improvement, always. Everything can be improved.
CIPHER.478.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Mapi León encoded as a Porta using a keyword of RUBY. What does it say?
CIPHER.478.author: Mapi León

CIPHER.485.cipherString: That which is striking and beautiful is not always good, but that which is good is always beautiful.
CIPHER.485.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Ninon de L'Enclos, written in a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.485.author: Ninon de L'Enclos

CIPHER.486.cipherString: No tree falls at the first blow.
CIPHER.486.question: The cafeteria receipt printed a German Proverb using the Affine cipher with a=7 and b=6. What does it say?
CIPHER.486.author: German Proverb

CIPHER.474.cipherString: Beware of the man who won't be bothered with details.
CIPHER.474.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by William Feather using the Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has EBOTH in it corresponding to the encoded text R S U I W B A, meaning A = ●×●; B = ●●●; I = –––; R = ×●×; S = ×–●; U = ●●×; W = ×–×. What does it say?
CIPHER.474.author: William Feather

CIPHER.468.cipherString: At some point, you just pull off the Band-Aid and it hurts, but then its over and you're relieved.
CIPHER.468.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by John Green encoded in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.468.author: John Green

CIPHER.475.cipherString: Happiness comes from within, not from without.
CIPHER.475.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Fractionated Morse message by David DeNotaris. You are told that the quote has NESSCO in it corresponding to the encoded text F N O S Z R W L, meaning F = –●×; L = –×–; N = ●×●; O = ●●×; R = ●–●; S = ●●●; W = ×––; Z = ××–. What does it say?
CIPHER.475.author: David DeNotaris

CIPHER.489.cipherString: The shortness of life, so often lamented, may be the best thing about it.
CIPHER.489.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by Arthur Schopenhauer, encoded in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of DIRECTLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.489.author: Arthur Schopenhauer

CIPHER.487.cipherString: Art is the daughter of freedom.
CIPHER.487.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Friedrich Schiller, written as an Affine Cipher with a=17 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.487.author: Friedrich Schiller

CIPHER.470.cipherString: El tiempo y el dinero gastados en ayudar a los hombres a hacer más por sí mismos es mucho mejor que simplemente dar.
CIPHER.470.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Henry Ford in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with EL. What does it say?
CIPHER.470.author: Henry Ford
CIPHER.470.translation: Time and money spent in helping men to do more for themselves is far better than mere giving.

CIPHER.479.cipherString: Learn how to be happy with what you have while you pursue all that you want.
CIPHER.479.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Porta note by Jim Rohn using a keyword of BINGO. What does it say?
CIPHER.479.author: Jim Rohn

CIPHER.476.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 7318 93165 8423 5608 decode to?

CIPHER.480.cipherString: Success without honor is an unseasoned dish it will satisfy your hunger, but it won't taste good.
CIPHER.480.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Joe Paterno, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ONOR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.480.author: Joe Paterno
